languages.text: {n}Ваша голова, кажется, вот-вот лопнет от боли. Спустя пару мгновений агония отступает, оставляя после себя странный шум. Он давит на разум, заглушает мысли, мешает думать... Ваш взгляд падает на молодого пилота, который следом за вами вываливается из упавшего шаттла. Неожиданно в душе поднимается волна удушливого гнева — ведь это он не сумел удержать управление!{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Ваша голова, кажется, вот-вот лопнет от боли. Спустя пару мгновений агония отступает, оставляя после себя странный шум. Он давит на разум, заглушает мысли, мешает думать... Ваш взгляд падает на молодого пилота, который следом за вами вываливается из упавшего шаттла. Неожиданно в душе поднимается волна удушливого гнева — ведь это он не сумел удержать управление!{/n}

languages.text: {n}Your skull feels like it is about to split under the pressure. A heartbeat later, the agony ebbs, leaving behind only a haunting hum. It smothers your mind, stifling all reason and hindering your ability to think. Your gaze falls on the young pilot, who survived the crash and stumbled out of the wrecked shuttle after you. A wave of sickening fury suddenly swells within you — he is the one who lost control of the vessel!{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Ваша голова, кажется, вот-вот лопнет от боли. Спустя пару мгновений агония отступает, оставляя после себя странный шум. Он давит на разум, заглушает мысли, мешает думать... Ваш взгляд падает на молодого пилота, который следом за вами вываливается из упавшего шаттла. Неожиданно в душе поднимается волна удушливого гнева — ведь это он не сумел удержать управление!{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Your skull feels like it is about to split under the pressure. A heartbeat later, the agony ebbs, leaving nothing behind but a haunting hum. It suffocates your mind, drowning out all reason and hindering your ability to think. Your gaze falls on the young pilot, who survived the crash and stumbled out of the wrecked shuttle after you. A wave of nauseating fury suddenly swells within you — he is the one who lost control of the vessel!{/n}

{n}Your skull feels like it is about to split under the pressure. A heartbeat later, the agony ebbs, leaving behind only a haunting hum. It smothers your mind, stifling all reason and hindering your ability to think. Your gaze falls on the young pilot, who survived the crash and stumbled out of the wrecked shuttle after you. A wave of sickening fury suddenly swells within you — he is the one who lost control of the vessel!{/n}

{n}Your head is buzzing and feels as if it is about to split open from the pain. You give it a shake, but the noise does not die down. It suffocates your mind, drowning out all reason and hindering your ability to think... Your gaze falls on the shuttle pilot, who survived the crash and stumbled out of the wrecked transport after you. A wave of fury suddenly swells within you — he is the one who lost control of the vessel!{/n}

{n}Your skull feels like it is about to split under the pressure. A heartbeat later, the agony ebbs, leaving nothing behind but a haunting hum. It suffocates your mind, drowning out all reason and hindering your ability to think. Your gaze falls on the young pilot, who survived the crash and stumbled out of the wrecked shuttle after you. A wave of nauseating fury suddenly swells within you — he is the one who lost control of the vessel!{/n}

{n}Your skull feels like it is about to split under the pressure. A heartbeat later, the agony ebbs, leaving behind only a haunting hum. It smothers your mind, stifling all reason and hindering your ability to think. Your gaze falls on the young pilot, who survived the crash and stumbled out of the wrecked shuttle after you. A wave of sickening fury suddenly swells within you — he is the one who lost control of the vessel!{/n}

languages.text: {n}頭の中が唸り、割れそうな痛みに襲われる。頭を振っても雑音は収まらない。理性をかき消し、考えることすらままならない……。ふと目に入ったのは、墜落を生き延び、あなたの後に残骸と化したシャトルからよろめき出てきた操縦士だ。不意に怒りの波がこみ上げる――機体を制御不能にしたのはあいつだ！{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your head is buzzing and feels as if it is about to split open from the pain. You give it a shake, but the noise does not die down. It suffocates your mind, drowning out all reason and hindering your ability to think... Your gaze falls on the shuttle pilot, who survived the crash and stumbled out of the wrecked transport after you. A wave of fury suddenly swells within you — he is the one who lost control of the vessel!{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}頭の中が唸り、割れそうな痛みに襲われる。頭を振っても雑音は収まらない。理性をかき消し、考えることすらままならない……。ふと目に入ったのは、墜落を生き延び、あなたの後に残骸と化したシャトルからよろめき出てきた操縦士だ。不意に怒りの波がこみ上げる――機体を制御不能にしたのはあいつだ！{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vous avez l'impression que votre crâne va éclater sous la pression. Un battement de cœur plus tard, la douleur reflue, ne laissant derrière elle qu'un bourdonnement persistant. Il étouffe votre esprit et asphyxie votre raison jusqu'à ce que vous ne puissiez plus réfléchir. Votre regard se pose sur le jeune pilote, qui a lui aussi survécu au crash et s'est extirpé de l'épave de la navette en titubant derrière vous. Soudain, une vague de colère viscérale déferle en vous : c'est lui qui a perdu le contrôle de l'appareil !{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your skull feels like it is about to split under the pressure. A heartbeat later, the agony ebbs, leaving behind only a haunting hum. It smothers your mind, stifling all reason and hindering your ability to think. Your gaze falls on the young pilot, who survived the crash and stumbled out of the wrecked shuttle after you. A wave of sickening fury suddenly swells within you — he is the one who lost control of the vessel!{/n}

Il étouffe votre esprit et asphyxie votre raison jusqu'à ce que vous ne puissiez plus réfléchir. Votre regard se pose sur le jeune pilote, qui a lui aussi survécu au crash et s'est extirpé de l'épave de la navette en titubant derrière vous. Soudain, une vague de colère viscérale déferle en vous : c'est lui qui a perdu le contrôle de l'appareil !{/n}

languages.text: {n}Kafatasın baskı altında ikiye yarılacakmış gibi hissediyorsun. Bir an sonra acı diniyor ve geriye tekinsiz bir uğultu kalıyor. Zihnini boğuyor, mantığını bastırıyor ve düşünme yetini engelliyor... Bakışların, kazadan sağ kurtulan ve enkazdan senin ardından tökezleyerek çıkan genç pilota kayıyor. İçinde aniden rahatsız edici bir öfke dalgası kabarıyor, geminin kontrolünü kaybeden aslında oymuş!{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your skull feels like it is about to split under the pressure. A heartbeat later, the agony ebbs, leaving behind only a haunting hum. It smothers your mind, stifling all reason and hindering your ability to think. Your gaze falls on the young pilot, who survived the crash and stumbled out of the wrecked shuttle after you. A wave of sickening fury suddenly swells within you — he is the one who lost control of the vessel!{/n}

İçinde aniden rahatsız edici bir öfke dalgası kabarıyor, geminin kontrolünü kaybeden aslında oymuş!{/n}

languages.text: {n}Dein Kopf fühlt sich an, als würde er angesichts des Drucks gleich zerspringen. Einen Herzschlag später lässt der Schmerz nach und weicht einem quälenden Summen. Es erstickt deinen Verstand und macht es dir unmöglich, einen klaren Gedanken zu fassen. Dein Blick fällt auf den jungen Piloten, der den Absturz überlebt hat und hinter dir aus dem zerstörten Shuttle taumelt. Mit einem Mal spürst du eine unerträgliche Wut in dir aufsteigen ... er war es, der die Kontrolle über das Schiff verloren hat!{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your skull feels like it is about to split under the pressure. A heartbeat later, the agony ebbs, leaving behind only a haunting hum. It smothers your mind, stifling all reason and hindering your ability to think. Your gaze falls on the young pilot, who survived the crash and stumbled out of the wrecked shuttle after you. Es erstickt deinen Verstand und macht es dir unmöglich, einen klaren Gedanken zu fassen. Dein Blick fällt auf den jungen Piloten, der den Absturz überlebt hat und hinter dir aus dem zerstörten Shuttle taumelt. Mit einem Mal spürst du eine unerträgliche Wut in dir aufsteigen ... er war es, der die Kontrolle über das Schiff verloren hat!{/n}

languages.text: {n}La presión es tan intensa que sientes como si tu cráneo estuviese a punto de partirse en dos. Un instante después la agonía cesa, reemplazada por un zumbido abrumador que suprime tu lógica y limita tu pensamiento. Tu mirada recae sobre el joven piloto, que ha sobrevivido al accidente y ha salido trastabillando de la lanzadera destrozada detrás de ti. Una oleada de furia visceral se alza en tu interior: ¡él es el que ha perdido el control del vehículo!{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your skull feels like it is about to split under the pressure. A heartbeat later, the agony ebbs, leaving behind only a haunting hum. It smothers your mind, stifling all reason and hindering your ability to think. Your gaze falls on the young pilot, who survived the crash and stumbled out of the wrecked shuttle after you. A wave of sickening fury suddenly swells within you — he is the one who lost control of the vessel!{/n}

languages.text: {n}你的头骨像是要被某种压力硬生生挤裂。疼痛在片刻后消散，只留下一缕挥之不去的嗡鸣。那声音遮蔽了你的心神，压制了所有理性，让你无法思考。幸存的飞行员跟着你从坠毁的穿梭机中跌跌撞撞地爬了出来。你的目光落在他身上，一股怒火猛然在你体内膨胀——就是他没有控制好飞船！{/n}
